description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, open-plan layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are clad in a light beige brick or stone material, complemented by large, dark-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure features multiple outdoor spaces, including a covered porch and a small balcony area, both accessible from the main living areas. The interior is divided into several rooms, including bedrooms, a living room, kitchen, and bathrooms, with visible interior partitions and furnishings. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on functional, spacious living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with light brick walls, large dark-framed windows, and multiple outdoor spaces including a porch and balcony. The layout is open and contemporary, with visible interior rooms and partitions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a covered porch area.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting additional windows, a balcony, and the back entrance.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the outdoor balcony and grouped windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the back rooms, windows, and part of the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
